description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a .cirrus_build_job template using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/libvirt/libvirt-ci/cirrus-run:latest, runs in the build stage with an 80m timeout, allows failure on exit code 3, and sets the variable QEMU_JOB_CIRRUS=1. The template script executes: set -o allexport, source .gitlab-ci.d/cirrus/$NAME.vars, set +o allexport, generate a Cirrus CI config with cirrus-vars <.gitlab-ci.d/cirrus/build.yml >.gitlab-ci.d/cirrus/$NAME.yml, cat the generated file, and run cirrus-run -v --show-build-log always .gitlab-ci.d/cirrus/$NAME.yml. Add an aarch64-macos-build job extending this template that sets CIRRUS_VM_IMAGE_NAME=ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-runner:sonoma, CIRRUS_VM_IMAGE_SELECTOR=image, CIRRUS_VM_INSTANCE_TYPE=macos_instance, CONFIGURE_ARGS='--target-list-exclude=arm-softmmu,i386-softmmu,microblazeel-softmmu,mips64-softmmu,mipsel-softmmu,mips-softmmu,ppc-softmmu,sh4-softmmu,xtensaeb-softmmu', INSTALL_COMMAND='brew install', NAME=macos-14, PATH_EXTRA='/opt/homebrew/ccache/libexec:/opt/homebrew/gettext/bin', PKG_CONFIG_PATH='/opt/homebrew/curl/lib/pkgconfig:/opt/homebrew/ncurses/lib/pkgconfig:/opt/homebrew/readline/lib/pkgconfig', TEST_TARGETS='check-unit check-block check-qapi-schema check-softfloat check-qtest-x86_64', and UPDATE_COMMAND='brew update'. Also add an x64-freebsd-14-build job extending the template that sets CIRRUS_VM_CPUS=8, CIRRUS_VM_IMAGE_NAME=freebsd-14-2, CIRRUS_VM_IMAGE_SELECTOR=image_family, CIRRUS_VM_INSTANCE_TYPE=freebsd_instance, CIRRUS_VM_RAM=8G, CONFIGURE_ARGS='--target-list-exclude=arm-softmmu,i386-softmmu,microblaze-softmmu,mips64el-softmmu,mipsel-softmmu,mips-softmmu,ppc-softmmu,sh4eb-softmmu,xtensa-softmmu', INSTALL_COMMAND='pkg install -y', NAME=freebsd-14, TEST_TARGETS='check', and UPDATE_COMMAND='pkg update; pkg upgrade -y', both running in the build stage.
